title: orthodon scaber
intro: Orthodon scaber, also known as the desert caltrop or sand bur, is a type of annual or perennial plant found in arid regions of the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orthodon scaber include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Orthodon scaber can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
